interpretation_rule: validation assigns confidence and sensitivity; it changes a core result only after a concrete pair-identity, reconstruction, or severe sequence-error failure

P04.effect: raw validation pending; the otherwise valid complete core result is retained, not converted to zero or deleted
P04.raw_scope: planned exact-individual CLR run remains unacquired

depth_structure.interpretation: low-depth enrichment is a duplication/mappability/dropout diagnostic and high-depth enrichment is a collapse/repeat diagnostic; neither alone proves an assembly error

P07.effect: concrete_haplotype_reconstruction_failure: preserve the core artifact and provenance, but do not use its pi or PSMC as validated quantitative evidence. Primary common-mask read/assembly pi ratio 0.436332; k-mer QV 35.9217; PSMC lambda r -0.144006; concrete Illumina/HiFi contradiction fractions 0.501223/0.531662.

execution.method_covariance: assembly/read pi and PSMC share H1 coordinates, assembly structural mask, and overlapping response data

kmer_heterozygosity.interpretation_limit: model-based spectrum estimate; repeats, coverage bias, and correlated k-mers are systematic uncertainty

kmer_qv.interval_scope: binomial_sampling_only; systematic read-kmer and assembly dependence excluded

comparison.error_bound_scope: observed paired-call disagreement brackets, not complete biological confidence bounds; assembly-only includes read-caller misses and read-only includes assembly-caller misses
comparison.mapping_qv_scope: homozygous-alt SNP discrepancies only; structural and inaccessible errors excluded

comparison.error_bound_scope: observed paired-call disagreement brackets, not complete biological confidence bounds; assembly-only includes read-caller misses and read-only includes assembly-caller misses
comparison.mapping_qv_scope: homozygous-alt SNP discrepancies only; structural and inaccessible errors excluded

comparison.error_bound_scope: observed paired-call disagreement brackets, not complete biological confidence bounds; assembly-only includes read-caller misses and read-only includes assembly-caller misses
comparison.mapping_qv_scope: homozygous-alt SNP discrepancies only; structural and inaccessible errors excluded

comparison.error_bound_scope: observed paired-call disagreement brackets, not complete biological confidence bounds; assembly-only includes read-caller misses and read-only includes assembly-caller misses
comparison.mapping_qv_scope: homozygous-alt SNP discrepancies only; structural and inaccessible errors excluded

comparison.error_bound_scope: observed paired-call disagreement brackets, not complete biological confidence bounds; assembly-only includes read-caller misses and read-only includes assembly-caller misses
comparison.mapping_qv_scope: homozygous-alt SNP discrepancies only; structural and inaccessible errors excluded

comparison.error_bound_scope: observed paired-call disagreement brackets, not complete biological confidence bounds; assembly-only includes read-caller misses and read-only includes assembly-caller misses
comparison.mapping_qv_scope: homozygous-alt SNP discrepancies only; structural and inaccessible errors excluded

method_covariance.pi: paired shared H1 coordinates and exact common callable mask; call sets are not independent
method_covariance.psmc: same H1 reference, PSMC parameters, structural mask, and overlapping response reads; trajectory comparison is sensitivity, not replication
method_covariance.qv: read k-mers and assembly derive from the same individual and partially overlapping underlying molecules

primary_common_mask_comparison.error_bound_scope: observed paired-call disagreement brackets, not complete biological confidence bounds; assembly-only includes read-caller misses and read-only includes assembly-caller misses
primary_common_mask_comparison.mapping_qv_scope: homozygous-alt SNP discrepancies only; structural and inaccessible errors excluded

primary_mask_exclusion_diagnostic.interpretation: depth-mask exclusion is a paired mappability/collapse sensitivity diagnostic, not by itself proof that every excluded assembly difference is false

hifi.bound_scope: lower=depth-qualified homozygous-reference contradictions; upper=all contradictions plus ambiguous/out-of-mask/unobserved sites; read mapping and caller covariance remains systematic

illumina.bound_scope: lower=depth-qualified homozygous-reference contradictions; upper=all contradictions plus ambiguous/out-of-mask/unobserved sites; read mapping and caller covariance remains systematic

validation_assessment.decision_rule: severe sequence error if k-mer QV <20; concrete reconstruction failure only if a majority of primary assembly SNPs are depth-qualified homozygous-reference contradictions in both Illumina and HiFi; otherwise pi ratio outside 0.8-1.25 or PSMC lambda r <0.5 is material method discordance, not a deletion trigger
validation_assessment.downstream_action: preserve the core artifact and provenance, but do not use its pi or PSMC as validated quantitative evidence

P09.effect: 0.81x diploid-equivalent partial HiFi coverage establishes individual/reference compatibility only; no absent estimate is represented as zero

limits.effect: assigns low raw-read validation confidence without deleting or converting any future core result to zero
limits.raw_scope: one complete HiFi SMRT cell from a seven-run assembly library
reasons: one SMRT cell is not the complete assembly read library
diploid reads mapped to one phased haplotype confound heterozygosity with sequence error
the inherited P09 assembly-derived pi/PSMC product was incomplete at validation freeze

retained_failed_R2_transfer.classification: full-size content mismatch; ENA MD5 failed and gzip trailer was invalid; clean retry passed
